nasb.text: For a fire went forth from Heshbon, A flame from the town of Sihon; It devoured Ar of Moab, The dominant heights of the Arnon.

esv.text: For fire came out from Heshbon, flame from the city of Sihon. It devoured Ar of Moab, and swallowed the heights of the Arnon.

cnv.text: 因為有火從希實本發出， 有火燄從西宏的城冒出， 吞滅了摩押的亞珥， 燒毀了亞嫩河的高岡。

ccb.text: 希实本烈焰熊熊， 西宏的城火光冲天， 烧毁摩押的亚珥， 吞噬亚嫩河的高岗。
